name: Scorchmark Duelist
title: Signs every fight in her name

abilities.name: First Blood
abilities.text: Deal 70. Doubles if opponent is full HP.

abilities.name: Signature Strike
abilities.text: Deal 140. If this KOs, draw 3 cards.

typed_abilities.name: First Blood
typed_abilities.text: Deal 70. Doubles if opponent is full HP.

typed_abilities.name: Signature Strike
typed_abilities.text: Deal 140. If this KOs, draw 3 cards.

flavor_text: She writes her name on every duelist she retires.
